data.title: Altcoins Show Early Bottoming Signs Against Bitcoin After 12-Month Decline
data.description:
After more than 12 months of sustained downside, collapsing sentiment, and structurally broken charts, recent data suggests the relative structure beneath the altcoin market may be shifting. According to a recent report, the Others Dominance chart, which tracks how altcoins perform relative to Bitcoin, is beginning to display early recovery signals.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/altcoins-show-early-bottoming-signs-against-bitcoin-after-12-month-decline/

data.title: Bitcoin's Stability Rewards Patient Investors
data.description: Crypto KOL Simon Hayes posted on X, emphasizing that Bitcoin (BTC) rewards patience rather than emotional decision-making. Hayes highlighted the importance of maintaining a calm and strategic approach when investing in Bitcoin, suggesting that long-term patience can lead to more favorable outcomes. This perspective aligns with the broader sentiment among cryptocurrency experts who advocate for a measured investment strategy in the volatile crypto market.

data.title: PancakeSwap V2 OCA/USDC pool on BSC drained of $422K
data.description:
The PancakeSwap V2 pool for OCAUSDC on BSC was exploited in a suspicious transaction detected today. The attack resulted in the loss of almost $500,000 worth of USDC market, drained in a single transaction. According to reports from Blockchain security platforms, the attacker exploited a vulnerability in the deflationary sellOCA() logic, giving them access to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/pancakeswap-v2-oca-usdc-pool-on-bsc-drained/

data.title: Everyone’s job is safety: Elon Musk fires back at xAI exodus concerns
data.description:

Only 12 of xAI’s original cofounders remain employed at the company after several of them left for various reasons, including to start their own companies and […]

data.title: BlackRock Transitions from Tradfi to DeFi
data.description: Scott Melker, host of The Wolf Of All Streets Podcast, posted on X, highlighting BlackRock's shift from traditional finance (Tradfi) to decentralized finance (DeFi). This move signifies a serious commitment to the evolving financial landscape.

data.title: Significant Bitcoin Transfer Observed Between Anonymous Addresses
data.description: A notable Bitcoin transaction was recorded involving the transfer of 149.19 BTC between anonymous addresses. According to ChainCatcher, at 06:36 UTC+8, the Bitcoin, valued at approximately $10.43 million, was moved from an address starting with 3GKyVLF to another beginning with 33M16z9. Subsequently, a portion of the Bitcoin, specifically 0.54 BTC, was transferred to a different anonymous address starting with 384UzHo.

data.title: Lindsey Vonn's Surgery on Broken Leg Successful
data.description: Lindsey Vonn announced that her recent surgery on the left leg she broke during the Olympic downhill event was successful. Bloomberg posted on X, the American skiing star expressed her relief and mentioned that she will soon return to the United States. Vonn, known for her remarkable skiing career, has faced multiple injuries throughout her time in the sport. Her latest operation marks another step in her recovery process.

data.description:

source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-on-valentines-day-from-1-to-69500-in-15-years/

data.title: Winter Olympics: Key Gold Medal Events to Watch on Sunday
data.description:
The Winter Olympics continue to captivate audiences worldwide with thrilling competitions and remarkable athletic performances. New York Times posted on X, highlighting the key gold medal events scheduled for Sunday. Fans can look forward to a day filled with excitement as athletes vie for top honors in various disciplines.

Among the anticipated events are the men's and women's skiing competitions, where competitors will showcase their skills on challenging courses. The figure skating finals promise to deliver breathtaking routines, with skaters aiming for perfection in their performances.

Additionally, the ice hockey matches are expected to draw significant attention, as teams battle for supremacy on the ice. The curling finals will also be a highlight, with teams strategizing to secure victory in this unique sport.

Spectators can follow the full schedule to ensure they don't miss any of the action. The Winter Olympics continue to be a celebration of athleticism and international camaraderie, with Sunday's events set to be a memorable part of the games.

data.title: Tether Acquires Stake in Gold.com to Enhance Gold-Backed Token Integration
data.description:
Tether has acquired a 12% stake in Gold.com for $150 million to facilitate the integration of its gold-backed token, XAU₮. According to NS3.AI, this acquisition aims to provide USDT holders with easy access to both tokenized and physical gold through a familiar cryptocurrency payment system. This strategic move is part of Tether's broader plan to position gold alongside Treasuries and cash equivalents as a core reserve asset, responding to increasing market concerns and the demand for hedges.

The partnership between Tether and Gold.com seeks to expand the distribution and adoption of tokenized gold. It addresses significant issues related to ownership, custody, and redemption, offering cryptocurrency users a seamless way to hedge without leaving the crypto ecosystem.

data.title: Paxful Fined $4M After Admitting It Profited From Criminal Activity on Its Crypto Platform
data.description:
Despite pleading guilty to serious AML violations, Paxful received a reduced $4 million penalty instead of the $112. 5 million figure agreed by the parties.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/paxful-fined-4m-after-admitting-it-profited-from-criminal-activity-on-its-crypto-platform/

data.title: Mexico Approves U.S. Special Forces Assistance to Combat Cartels
data.description:
The Long View, institutional investor, posted on X. Mexico's government has unanimously approved the deployment of U.S. special forces to assist in the fight against drug cartels within its borders. This decision marks a significant step in the collaboration between the two nations to address the ongoing issues of drug trafficking and organized crime.

The U.S. special forces are set to provide training to Mexican special forces, enhancing their capabilities in combating the powerful cartels that have long plagued the region. This partnership underscores the commitment of both countries to tackle the challenges posed by these criminal organizations.

The move has been met with widespread approval, reflecting a shared understanding of the need for international cooperation in addressing transnational crime. The training and support from U.S. forces are expected to bolster Mexico's efforts in restoring peace and security in affected areas.

This development highlights the ongoing efforts to strengthen bilateral relations and improve security measures in the region. The collaboration is seen as a crucial step in the broader strategy to dismantle the operations of drug cartels and reduce their influence.

data.title: The Rise of DeFi ETFs: From Bitcoin to Protocol Exposure
data.description:
DeFi ETFs may mark the next phase of crypto institutionalization, expanding exposure from Bitcoin and Ethereum toward protocol-level assets.

The post The Rise of DeFi ETFs: From Bitcoin to Protocol Exposure first appeared on Crypto News And Market Updates | BTCUSA.

source: https://btcusa.com/the-rise-of-defi-etfs-from-bitcoin-to-protocol-exposure/
